name: Tier 2 export ICS button downloads calendar file
description: Logged-in user clicks the Export .ics button in the dashboard header and receives a calendar download

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard to load
Click the header toolbar button whose visible label text is exactly Export .ics located in the top sticky header bar beside the Logout button
Wait for 3 seconds for the export to complete
Verify the dashboard shows a success banner message confirming the calendar was exported and timeora.ics was downloaded
